dashboardSummary: English/Polish workspace for Allegro research: paste evidence and get risk, objection, and opportunity reports.
historySummary: Return to previous category research, risks, and listing recommendations.
noHistoryDetail: Generated reports will appear here after refresh.
transparencyBody: The report analyzes pasted evidence and notes. Allegro links are context references, not automatically fetched page content.
transparencyUrlNote: Allegro URLs: saved as references, without scraping or claims of page analysis.
failedReportHelp: Copy the diagnostics above when contacting support.
acceptedWaiting: The API accepted the report. Waiting for the background job to finish.
feedbackQuestion: Was this report useful for your Allegro decision?
emptyDetailHelp: Generate a new report or open an item from history.
